sum(rate(coredns_cache_hits_total{instance=~"$instance", type="success"}[5m]))) / sum(rate(coredns_cache_requests_total{instance=~"$instance"}[5m]))","legendFormat":"misses","refId":"C"}],"title":"Cache (hitrate)","type":"timeseries"},{"datasource":{"type":"prometheus","uid":"PBFA97CFB590B2093"},"description":"Rate of DNS requests with the DNSSEC OK (DO) bit set, broken down by zone.
